untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern requires precise identification of multi-bar U-shaped cup formation and subsequent handle consolidation with specific geometric constraints. These require multi-bar pattern recognition logic that cannot be reduced to single-bar indicator comparisons. The measured target calculation (handle height subtracted from breakout point) is a rule-based computation not available in standard indicators. Approximated conditions above using Donchian breakout and price position, but true pattern structure is untranslatable to this indicator set.
